result: Successfully cleaned and harmonized the income band variables. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains 9,408 observations with variables NSID, inc25 (income at age 25 from wave 8), and inc32 (income at age 32 from wave 9). Missing values from absent respondents were coded as -3, and all income variables have proper labelled factors with substantive categories and standard missing value codes (-1, -2, -3, -8, -9).
